solutions.solution: Statement: The government has increased the price of bread. Invalid Assumption: The price of bread was very low. Generally, prices are increased not because they are low but because they are compulsions to raise it. The Government is not a cruel and agency that goes around raising prices of everything that is cheap. In fact, Govts try their best to keep inflation under control (that is, to keep the prices low). They raise prices only because they are not left with any choice and they need revenue. Yes, when they raise prices they do try to raise prices of only those goods in particular whose prices are lower than what could be tolerable. But, even then, the word "very low" in the given assumption is definitely questionable.

Statement: Since certain sections of the society are going to be unhappy whenever reforms are implemented, there is little that can be done to prevent it except abandoning it. Invalid Assumption: Some people would not like the implementation of reforms.
Statement: Of all the TV sets manufactured in India, brand X has the largest sale. Invalid Assumption: No other brand of TV sets has as high a sale as brand X.
Statement: Friendship is beneficial. Invalid Assumptions: I. Enmity is harmful. II. Enmity is not beneficial. III. Friendship is not harmful.
Statement: "Smoking is injurious to health." - a notice. Invalid Assumption: Non-smoking promotes health.
Statement: Some/many historians harm the society by distorting facts. Invalid Assumption: Some of those who distort facts and harm society are historians.
Statement: No unexperienced fellow could be employed. Invalid Assumption: No one who could be employed should lack in experience.
Statement: Ram went to Gaya on 27th July. Shyam went two days after him. Invalid assumption: Shyam went to Gaya on 29th July.

Statement: Religion is based primarily and mainly upon fear; it is partly the fear of the unknown and partly the wish to feel that one has a saviour who will stand by in times of despair and defeat. Invalid Assumption: Man's fear of the unknown and defeat makes him religious.
Statement: Religious instruction leads to a curiosity for knowledge. So, all teaching should be done in religious spirit. Invalid Assumption: Curious persons are good persons.

Statement: The Central Excise Collectorate has begun the exercise of smooth transition from licence system to simplified registration system for all the manufacturers. - a news item. Invalid Assumptions: I. The Central Excise Collectorate had carefully reviewed the licence system.
